description_long: This is an ornate, multi-armed candelabrum featuring five tall, slender white candles arranged symmetrically around a central stem. The base and arms are crafted from a dark, likely metallic material, with elegant, curved branches extending outward to support each candle. The central stem is robust and tapers upward, providing stability and a classic silhouette. Each candle sits in a shallow, round holder at the end of each arm, ensuring they remain upright and secure. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European candleholders, often found in upscale urban settings or historical districts. The object exudes a sense of sophistication and is suitable for decorative or ceremonial use in public or private urban spaces.
description: A classic five-armed black metal candelabrum with tall white candles, featuring ornate curved arms and a sturdy round base. Its elegant design makes it ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five candles and the symmetrical arrangement of the ornate arms.
description_view_1: Side view with three candles visible in a row and two arms extending backward, partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying all five candles and the intricate arm structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three candles in a row and two arms extending backward, mirroring view 1.
